mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT v.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName FROM vw_user_auth v JOIN users u ON u.user_code = v.user_code WHERE v.project_code = #{projectCode} AND u.is_lock != 1 ORDER BY u.name

SELECT DISTINCT i.assignee_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND i.assignee_code IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT i.created_by_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.created_by_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT n.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM notices n JOIN users u ON u.user_code = n.user_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = n.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = n.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT v2.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, v2.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM vw_user_auth v2 JOIN users u ON u.user_code = v2.user_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = v2.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = v2.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT wl.worker_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM work_logs wl JOIN issues i ON i.issue_code = wl.issue_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = wl.worker_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND wl.worker_code IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT da.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, da.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM documents_attachments da JOIN users u ON u.user_code = da.user_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = da.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND da.user_code IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = da.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.admin_ck = 'N' AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName
